context: Tests whether the agent follows the Core ML conversion and optimization guidance owned by the on-device AI skill while preserving the boundary with Swift app integration.

checklist.name: Eval mode
checklist.description: Requires inference/eval mode before tracing or exporting the PyTorch model.

checklist.name: Parity baseline
checklist.description: Requires validating the converted model against the source framework before optimization.

checklist.name: Modern format
checklist.description: Chooses mlprogram saved as an mlpackage for new work and avoids legacy neuralnetwork as the default.

checklist.name: Deployment target
checklist.description: Sets an explicit minimum deployment target appropriate to the intended devices and model format.

checklist.name: Shape strategy
checklist.description: Prefers fixed or enumerated input shapes over broad range dimensions when known shapes are sufficient.

checklist.name: Compression caution
checklist.description: Rejects blanket low-bit compression of every tensor and recommends selective compression with accuracy gates.

checklist.name: Device validation
checklist.description: Requires validation and profiling on physical target devices rather than relying only on simulator or desktop checks.

checklist.name: Profiling availability
checklist.description: Corrects the Core ML compute-plan profiling availability for iOS 17.0-era assumptions.

checklist.name: Boundary control
checklist.description: Keeps the answer focused on conversion and optimization instead of expanding into detailed Swift Core ML app wiring.
